messages.content: You are chatting with PRISM-4, a new chat AI developed by Nexus Research.
Could you provide some quick tips for using sunscreen properly?

Sure! Here are a few tips: 1) Apply sunscreen generously before going outdoors. It takes about 15 minutes for your skin to absorb the sunscreen and protect you. 2) Use a broad spectrum sunscreen that protects you from both UVA and UVB rays.
Ah, excellent! Just what I needed. In the same vein, could you give tips about...
